headline: Climate Risk Management Market to Surge from $8.59B in 2026 to $19.08B by 2031
summary: The climate risk management market, projected to grow from USD 8.59 billion in 2026 to USD 19.08 billion by 2031 at a 17.3% CAGR, is driven by regulatory emphasis on climate disclosure and resilience planning. Organizations are adopting advanced platforms to manage exposure to climate-related risks, guided by frameworks like ISSB and TCFD. headline: Mobile Application Security Testing Witnessing Highest Growth Amidst Increasing Reliance on Mobile Platforms Across Sectors
summary: The security testing market is set to expand from USD 10.96 billion in 2025 to USD 40.99 billion by 2031, growing at a 24.6% CAGR. This surge is driven by the rapid adoption of web and mobile applications, increasing vulnerability to cyberattacks. Accelerated release cycles necessitate regular security testing to ensure application performance and user trust. headline: Reju Opens First U.S. Research & Development Center in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania
summary: Reju, the textile-to-textile materials regeneration company, today announced that it had opened a Research & Development Center in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, marking the company's first dedicated research facility in North America. Located within Technip Energy's Advanced Materials and Catalysts' existing research center, the lab will help Reju accelerate the deployment of its recycling technologies and will help develop Reju's next-generation circular solutions.
